docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $130.00 FILED BY HART STEPHANIE AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS KAREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-1991 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $452.50 FILED BY LEWIS KAREN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HART STEPHANIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-1991 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF HART STEPHANIE

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HART STEPHANIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEWIS KAREN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LEWIS KAREN RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT HART STEPHANIE $130.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $130.00, DEF.AND X-COMPLAINANT MAY RETAIN THE $130.00 DEPOSIT BEING HELD TO SATISFY THE JUDGEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
